chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 153 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A- 3670 of 2020 (U/o 39 R.4 C.P.C.) 3. For hearing of M.A- 1117 of 2020 (Stay application). 4. For hearing of main case. 24.09.2020 Mr. Ishrat Ali Lohar, Advocate for petitioner, alongwith the petitioner. Mr. Humayoon Khan, Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan. Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan, Advocate for respondents / HESCO. = Learned counsel for respondents / HESCO files a statement alongwith certain documents, which is taken on record, copy whereof provided to learned counsel for petitioner. Perusal of above statement reveals that payment of salaries as well as other allowances as admissible under the rules has been made to the petitioner. When confronted this position, petitioner Zafar Ali Solangi present has replied in affirmative. In these circumstances, this petition having achieved its purpose, stands disposed of alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE S
